solutions.solution:
6 persons are sitting in a row. They are A, B, C, D, E and F. C is not sitting beside D who is sitting on the extreme right. E is between A and C. A is not sitting beside F and D. B is between F and D. Who is immediate right of A?
(a) B (b) C (c) D (d) E

Sol. (a) Arrangement of persons, according to the question, is as follows
Left ← A E C F B D → Right
Clearly, E is sitting to the immediate right of A
